              Defects fixed prior session (full details in lessons.md):

                Fix #1 (assignment-dialog.test.tsx L96):
                  SelectMeta type widened to accept undefined values
                  Root cause: exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true

                Fix #2 (assignment-dialog.test.tsx L142–146):
                  MockSelectTrigger useEffect deps reduced from
                  [ctx, testId, id] → [testId, id] + eslint-disable
                  Root cause: ctx is a useMemo recomputed from meta,
                  effect mutates meta via ctx.setMeta() → infinite loop
                  → vitest OOM (553s wall, 0ms test exec)
